conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I have to decide on the deployment strategy for the new service. Candidates are blue-green deployment, canary releases, and rolling updates.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Blue-green requires double the infrastructure at cutover which is expensive.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Rolling updates are simple but mean multiple versions run simultaneously, which is a problem because our DB migrations aren't backward compatible.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Canary lets us test with a small percentage of traffic before fully rolling out, and we can keep the old version stable while validating.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We'll go with canary releases. The ability to limit blast radius on a bad deploy matters more than the simplicity of rolling updates.

query: Which deployment strategy did the user choose for the new service?
